name: AVANI | Personal Loan Enquiry
headline: Get Personal Loan up to ₹40 Lakhs
description: Quick Eligibility Check, Fast Processing, Minimal Documentation, Expert Assistance
fields: Full Name, Mobile Number, Email Address, City, Required Loan Amount, Employment Type, Monthly Income
docs: PAN Card, Aadhaar Card, Salary Slips, Bank Statement

name: AVANI | Business Loan Enquiry
headline: Grow Your Business with AVANI Business Loans
description: Easy Working Capital, High Disbursals, Flexible EMI Tenures
fields: Full Name, Mobile Number, Business Name, Business Vintage, Annual Turnover, Loan Requirement, Required Amount
docs: GST Returns, ITR, Bank Statements, Udyam Registration, Company PAN

name: AVANI | Doctor Loan Enquiry
headline: Professional Loans for Doctors & Specialists
description: Specialized Funding for Clinic Setup, Equipment, & Expansion
fields: Name, Mobile, Profession, Experience, Annual Income, Loan Requirement
docs: Degree Certificate, Registration Certificate, ITR, Bank Statements

name: AVANI | Home Loan Assistance
headline: Lowest Home Loan Interest Rates starting from 8.4%
description: Expert Assistance, Quick Approvals, Resale & Plot Funding
fields: Name, Mobile, Property Location, Property Type, Property Value, Required Loan Amount, Employment Type
docs: Aadhaar, PAN, Income Proof, Property Documents

name: AVANI | Mortgage Loan
headline: Unlock the Value of Your Property
description: Loan Against Property with Low EMI Rates
fields: Name, Mobile, Property Type, Property Market Value, Existing Loan on Property?, Required Amount
docs: Property Papers, Latest Tax Receipt, PAN, Aadhaar, Bank Statements

name: AVANI | Education Loan (INDIA)
headline: Fund Your Higher Studies in India's Premier Colleges
fields: Student Name, Parent Name, Mobile Number, Course Name, College Name, Course Fees, State
docs: Admission Letter, Fee Structure, Aadhaar, PAN, Academic Records

name: AVANI | Education Loan (ABROAD)
headline: Global Studies Education Loans with Easy Processing
description: Fund USA, UK, Canada, Australia and Germany Study Admissions
fields: Student Name, Mobile Number, Country, University Name, Course, Total Cost, Intake
docs: Offer Letter, Passport, Academic Records, Co-applicant Income Proof

name: AVANI | School & College Funding
headline: Institutional Funding for Educational Infrastructures
description: Expand School Blocks, Buy Machinery, Upgrade Degree Colleges
fields: Institution Name, Contact Person, Mobile Number, Institution Type, Funding Requirement, Required Amount
docs: Trust Registration, Financial Statements, Institution Approval Documents

name: AVANI | CIBIL Improvement Consultation
headline: Improve Your Credit Score & Get Loan Approval
description: Professional advice to improve your credit score, resolve defaults, and build a strong credit profile.
fields: Full Name, Mobile Number, Email Address, Current CIBIL, Past Loan Rejection, CIBIL Issue, Goal, Timeline
docs: Latest CIBIL Report, ID Proof, PAN Card
